feature_tested: EchoAi3 Confidence Visualization Engine & Chef-Mode Cognitive Assistant
summary: Comprehensive testing of two new EchoAi3 engines. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Confidence Panel fully functional with all key elements verified. Chef-Mode is backend-only API (no frontend panel).

endpoints: GET /api/echoai3/confidence/heatmap - returns 9 domain confidence scores with coverage, freshness, completeness, blind spots, platform_confidence (68%)
GET /api/echoai3/confidence/domain/finance - returns detailed confidence for finance domain (61%)
GET /api/echoai3/confidence/domain/invalid - returns error with available domains list
GET /api/echoai3/confidence/usage - returns AI usage stats (sessions, feedback, satisfaction)
POST /api/echoai3/chef/allergen-check - check ingredients against allergens (3 flags detected)
POST /api/echoai3/chef/substitute - find substitution for butter (3 options returned)
POST /api/echoai3/chef/prep-timeline - generate prep timeline (200 covers, 11 milestones)
GET /api/echoai3/chef/allergen-matrix - returns full allergen matrix (8 allergens)
Culinary domain exists in heatmap (used by Chef mode)

verified_elements: Platform Confidence header with 68% and MODERATE badge
9 domain cards with animated confidence rings (domain-{name} data-testid)
Domain cards expandable to show collection details and blind spots
Coverage/Freshness/Completeness score bars in expanded cards
Collections list with record counts and freshness status
Blind spots warnings with AlertTriangle icons
ui_features_verified: Confidence Panel loads from sidebar under Analytics & AI > Confidence Map
Platform confidence percentage (68%) displayed prominently in header
MODERATE status badge with correct color coding
Summary bar shows: 2 High, 6 Moderate, 1 Low, 0 Blind Spots, 450 Total Data Points
9 domain cards with animated SVG confidence rings
Domain cards sorted by confidence (lowest first)
Labor domain shows 36% LOW with red color coding
Event & Banquet shows 100% HIGH with green color coding
Clicking domain card expands to show detailed metrics
Collections list shows record counts and freshness status (fresh/recent/aging/stale)
Blind spots section shows warnings (e.g., 'No data in labor_actuals')
Recommendations section shows prioritized actions with HIGH/MEDIUM badges
Recommendations include domain, confidence %, action, and impact

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests used existing MongoDB collections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Confidence Visualization Engine and Chef-Mode Cognitive Assistant are fully functional. The Confidence heatmap pulls live record counts from MongoDB collections (9 domains). Labor domain shows 36% LOW confidence due to missing labor_actuals data. Chef-Mode is backend-only API accessible via /api/echoai3/chef/* endpoints - no frontend panel exists for Chef-Mode. The allergen matrix has 8 categories. Recipe scaling applies 15% seasoning reduction for batches >10x. Toast POS and QuickBooks integrations remain MOCKED with demo/sandbox data.
notes: All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend Confidence Panel fully verified with Playwright automation. The panel correctly displays real-time confidence metrics across 9 intelligence domains with animated rings, expandable cards, recommendations, and usage stats. Chef-Mode Cognitive Assistant is backend-only (no UI panel) - accessible via API or EchoAi³ Canvas /think endpoint.
